zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel於1230年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根利安善納時，他的父親Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon26歲，母親Betyn Norris20歲。他與Agnes de Cantilupe結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1300年在英國威爾斯丹比爾享年71歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯丹比爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel于1230年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根利安善納时，他的父亲Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon26岁，母亲Betyn Norris20岁。他与Agnes de Cantilupe结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1300年在英国威尔斯丹比爾享年71岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯丹比爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel was born in 1230, in Llansannor, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon, was 26 and his mother, Betyn Norris, was 20. He married Agnes de Cantilupe. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1300, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Breigan, Llansanwyr, Glamorgan, Wales, U: Llansannor, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel est né en 1230, à Llansannor, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Betyn Norris, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Cantilupe. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1300, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel 1230 in Llansannor, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon 26 und seine Mutter Betyn Norris 20. Er hat Agnes de Cantilupe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1300 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel è nato il nel 1230 nel Llansannor, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Betyn Norris, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Cantilupe. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1300, nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel Fychan Ap Hywelが1230年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンランサノーで生まれた時，父Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgonは26歳，母Betyn Norrisは20歳であった。Agnes de Cantilupeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1300年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで71歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel(이)가 1230년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 랜산어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Betyn Norris(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Agnes de Cantilupe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1300년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel nasceu em 1230, em Llansannor, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Betyn Norris, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Cantilupe. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1300, em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel родился в 1230 г. в местности ллансаннор, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Betyn Norris, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Cantilupe. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1300 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel nació en 1230, en Llansannor, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Hywel 'Dew' ap Cadwgon, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Betyn Norris, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agnes de Cantilupe. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1300, en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
